{{Infobox artifact
| name = Calder's silver key
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has a small silver key invested with his [[Intent]] that causes crippling pain to anyone else who picks it up.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
